title: selaginella caulescens
intro: Selaginella caulescens, also known as Chinese spikenard, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella caulescens include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. Selaginella caulescens is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
